user.title: Connect to CLiC HC-108
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of the CLiC HC-108 Network Controller on your local network. Auth fields are optional — try without credentials first (default admin/admin if required).

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the HC-108 (shown on its front-panel Settings tab).
data_description.port: HTTP port of the HC-108 web API. Leave at 80 unless your network routes it differently.
data_description.token: Bearer token if your firmware requires API token auth. Leave blank if not required.
data_description.username: HTTP Basic Auth username. Leave blank if not required (default: admin).
data_description.password: HTTP Basic Auth password. Leave blank if not required (default: admin).

channels.title: Name your glass zones
channels.description: Give each of the {channel_count} glass output channels a friendly name. These become the device names in Home Assistant. You can rename them later in the integration options.

data_description.channel_1: Friendly name for glass zone 1 (e.g. Master Bath, Office Partition).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate CLiC HC-108
reauth_confirm.description: The HC-108 at {host} is rejecting the saved credentials. Enter updated credentials below. Leave fields blank if no authentication is required.

data_description.token: Bearer token if your firmware requires API token auth. Leave blank if not required.
data_description.username: HTTP Basic Auth username (default: admin). Leave blank if not required.
data_description.password: HTTP Basic Auth password (default: admin). Leave blank if not required.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure CLiC HC-108 connection
reconfigure.description: Update the host, port, or credentials for this HC-108 controller. Your existing zone names and automations will be preserved.

data_description.host: The IP address or hostname of the HC-108.
data_description.port: HTTP port of the HC-108 web API. Leave at 80 unless your network routes it differently.
data_description.token: Bearer token if your firmware requires API token auth. Leave blank if not required.
data_description.username: HTTP Basic Auth username. Leave blank if not required.
data_description.password: HTTP Basic Auth password. Leave blank if not required.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the HC-108. Check the host/IP and that the controller is powered on and reachable.
error.invalid_auth: The HC-108 rejected the provided credentials. Check username/password or API token. Default credentials are admin / admin.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host or IP address. Enter a valid hostname or IPv4 address (e.g. 192.168.1.10 or hc108.local).
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This HC-108 (MAC: {unique_id}) is already configured. Its connection details have been updated.
abort.reauth_successful: Credentials updated — the integration has been reloaded successfully.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Connection settings updated and the integration has been reloaded.
abort.wrong_device: The controller at the new address has a different MAC address. Use 'Add Integration' to add a second HC-108 controller.

init.title: Rename glass zones
init.description: Update the friendly names for each glass channel. Changes take effect immediately.

data_description.channel_1: Friendly name for glass zone 1 (e.g. Master Bath, Office Partition).
